name: miraidon
flavor_text: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

moves.name: thunder-shock
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: dragon-breath
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: parabolic-charge
moves.effect: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: mirror-coat
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.

moves.name: acrobatics
moves.effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confuse-ray
moves.effect: Confuses the target.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: draco-meteor
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

moves.name: dragon-claw
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dragon-pulse
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dragon-tail
moves.effect: Ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: electro-ball
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: flash-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: heavy-slam
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: metal-sound
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: outrage
moves.effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.

moves.name: overheat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

moves.name: power-gem
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snarl
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: solar-beam
moves.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: u-turn
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: wild-charge
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

abilitiesDetailed.name: hadron-engine
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
